transcript: Book club this evening was quite lively. We were discussing a memoir about a woman who walks across Iceland alone. There was a real debate about whether she was being self-indulgent or brave. I said I thought she was both and everyone laughed. Celia brought her lemon drizzle cake which was absolutely delicious, I had two slices. Walked home in the evening light feeling very stimulated. Glad I made the effort to go.
